name: Saucy Bean 'n Beef Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together the meat, half the onions, bread crumbs, 1/4 cup of soup, egg, thyme leaves, salt, and pepper.
3. Press the mixture evenly onto the bottom and sides of an ungreased 9-inch pie pan.
4. Spread the drained green beans over the meat layer in the pan, then pour the remaining soup over the beans.
5. Bake, uncovered, for 35 minutes.
6. Arrange the remaining onions on top of the mixture.
7. Continue baking for another 10 minutes.
8. Let cool for about 5 minutes before cutting into wedges and serving.
